---
title: "Summary Stats/Visualizations"
author: "North Carpenter"
date: "2026-05-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(gganimate)
library(sf)
library(maps)
library(gifski)
library(mapproj)
```

# Import Data

## 2023
```{r, include=FALSE}
# Importing Data
# Clean Data
crash2023 <- read.csv("../566 Project Data/crashes2023.csv")
head(crash2023)
crash2023 <- crash2023 %>%
  select(-X)

# General Data Sets
accident2023 <- read.csv("../566 Project Data/FARS2023NationalCSV/accident.csv")
person2023 <- read.csv("../566 Project Data/FARS2023NationalCSV/PERSON.csv")
drugs2023 <- read.csv("../566 Project Data/FARS2023NationalCSV/drugs.csv")

colnames(crash2023)
```

## Positional Data
```{r}
fileLoc <- "../566 Project Data"

files <- c("accident.csv")

merging_Vars <- c("ST_CASE", "VEH_NO", "PER_NO")

accident_keep <- c("LATITUDE", "LONGITUD", "FATALS", "MONTH", "DAY", "YEAR", "ST_CASE", "STATE")

var_map <- list(
  "accident.csv" = accident_keep
)

importYears <- function(start, end, files, fileLoc)
{
  # Imports CSVs for a range of years into a named list
  # ====================================================
  # Inputs
  # - start:   start year of data as integer
  # - end:     end year of data as integer
  # - files:   character vector of CSV filenames (e.g. "accident.csv")
  # - fileLoc: path to the project data folder
  # Outputs
  # - named list of data frames, keyed as "YYYY_filename.csv"
  years <- start:end
  combos <- expand.grid(year = years, file = files, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  paths <- paste0(fileLoc, "/FARS", combos$year, "NationalCSV/", combos$file)
  crashFiles <- lapply(paths, function(p) as.data.frame(data.table::fread(p)))
  
  # Preserve Names
  names(crashFiles) <- paste0(combos$year, "_", combos$file)
  
  return(crashFiles)
}

trimYear <- function(crash_data, year, var_map, merging_Vars) {
  # Trims a single year of data to only the columns needed for analysis
  # ====================================================================
  # Inputs
  # - crash_data: named list of data frames from importYears
  # - year:       integer year to trim
  # - var_map:    named list mapping filenames to their keep variables
  # Outputs
  # - named list of trimmed data frames for the given year, keyed by filename
  Map(function(file, vars) {
    key <- paste0(year, "_", file)
    crash_data[[key]] %>% select(any_of(c(merging_Vars, vars)))
  }, names(var_map), var_map)
}

trimAllYears <- function(crash_data, start, end, var_map, merging_Vars) {
  # Trims all years of data to only the columns needed for analysis
  # ================================================================
  # Inputs
  # - crash_data: named list of data frames from importYears
  # - start:      start year of data as integer
  # - end:        end year of data as integer
  # - var_map:    named list mapping filenames to their keep variables
  # Outputs
  # - nested named list keyed as result[["YYYY"]][["filename.csv"]]
  years <- start:end
  result <- lapply(years, function(year) trimYear(crash_data, year, var_map, merging_Vars))
  names(result) <- years
  return(result)
}

trimmed_flat <- importYears(2012, 2024, files, fileLoc) 
trimmed_flat <- trimAllYears(trimmed_flat, 2012, 2024, var_map, merging_Vars)

all_accidents <- bind_rows(trimmed_flat)
all_accidents <- all_accidents[[1]]

rm(trimmed_flat)
```

```{r}
all_accidents |>
  group_by(YEAR, ST_CASE) |>
  filter(n() > 1) |>
  ungroup()
```



# Data Overiview

```{r}
looknon <- function(df)
{
  # Take a DF and returns a new df that counts na/"" in one column and 
  # "None"/"none" in another column. Also returns the number of unique values 
  # per column.
  
  df <- df |>
    mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>% #make everything char for ==
    pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "value") %>%
    group_by(column) %>% # set up groups
    summarise(
      num_missing = sum(is.na(value) | value == "", na.rm = TRUE),
      num_None = sum(value == "None" | value == "none", na.rm = TRUE),
      num_unique  = n_distinct(value)
    ) #summarize to these col
  return(df)
}
```

## Vission
```{r}
countVission <- vission2023 |>
  count(VISION)
countVission
sum(countVission$n) - 54793

3751 / sum(countVission$n)
```


## Vehicle Stats
```{r}
vehicle2023 |>
  count(M_HARM)

vehicle2023 |>
  count(VPAVETYPNAME)

vehicle2023 |>
  count(VSURCONDNAME)
```


## Acidedent Summary
```{r}
looknon(accident2023)
```

## veVent File
```{r}
head(cEvent2023)

cEvent2023 |>
  group_by(ST_CASE)|>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

cEvent2023 |>
  group_by(SOE)|>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
```


## Pedestrians and Injuries
```{r}
person2023 |>
  group_by(PER_TYPNAME, INJ_SEVNAME) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = INJ_SEVNAME,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )
```

## Person Type
```{r}
person2023 |>
  count(PER_TYPNAME)

person2023 |>
  group_by(PER_TYPNAME, DRINKINGNAME) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = DRINKINGNAME,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )
```


## Alcohol
```{r}
person2023 |>
  count(ALC_RESNAME)

person2023 |>
  count(DRINKINGNAME)

person2023 |>
  group_by(PER_TYPNAME, DRINKINGNAME) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = DRINKINGNAME,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  )
```


## Drugs
```{r}
drugtype <- drugs2023 |> 
  group_by(DRUGRESNAME) |> 
  summarise(n = n()) |> 
  mutate(percent = n / sum(n))
drugtype

drugs2023 |>
  count(DRUGRESNAME)
```

# Pretty Pictures
```{r}
accident2023noLat <- accident2023 |>
  filter(STATENAME != "Alaska",
         LATITUDE > 24, LATITUDE < 72,
         LONGITUD > -180, LONGITUD < -65)


my_sf <- st_as_sf(accident2023noLat, coords = c('LONGITUD', 'LATITUDE'))

my_sf <- st_set_crs(my_sf, 4326)

#Plot it:

ggplot(my_sf) + 
  geom_sf(aes(color = STATENAME), size = 0.01) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

```{r}
accident2023seattle <- accident2023 |>
  filter(STATENAME == "Connecticut",
         LATITUDE > 24, LATITUDE < 72,
         LONGITUD > -180, LONGITUD < -65)

axSeattleMap <- st_as_sf(accident2023seattle, coords = c('LONGITUD', 'LATITUDE'))

axSeattleMap <- st_set_crs(axSeattleMap, 4326)

#Plot it:

ggplot(axSeattleMap) + 
  geom_sf(aes(color = FATALS), size = 1)

```

## Gifs
```{r}
head(all_accidents)
```

### Drop Unknown
```{r}
rall_accidents <- all_accidents %>%
  filter(
    MONTH != 99,
    DAY != 99,
    STATE != 15 & STATE != 2 & STATE != 43,
    LATITUDE > 24, LATITUDE < 72,
    LONGITUD > -180, LONGITUD < -65
  )
```

```{r}
rm(all_accidents)
```

### Date Time
```{r}
rall_accidents <- rall_accidents |>
  mutate(date = make_date(YEAR, MONTH, DAY))

head(rall_accidents)
```
### LatLong
```{r}
map_accidents <- st_as_sf(rall_accidents, coords = c('LONGITUD', 'LATITUDE'))

map_accidents <- st_set_crs(map_accidents, 4326)

head(map_accidents)
```


### Animation Function
```{r}
animateAccidents <- function(accidents, state = 0){
  if(state != 0){
    accidents <- accidents %>%
      filter(STATE == state)
  }
  
  accidents <- accidents %>%
    mutate(
      expire_date = pmin(date %m+% years(4), as.Date("2025-01-01"))
    )

  plot <- ggplot(accidents, aes(x = LONGITUD, y = LATITUDE, color = STATE)) +
    geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.3, shape = 16, show.legend = FALSE) +
    coord_map("albers", lat0 = 30, lat1 = 45) +
    transition_events(
      start = date,
      end = expire_date,
      enter_length = as.difftime(30, units = "days"),
      exit_length = as.difftime(1, units = "days")
    ) +
    enter_fade() +
    labs(title = "Date: {frame_time}") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
          axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
  
  anim <- animate(plot, 
                  nframes = 144, 
                  fps = 10, 
                  duration = 14, 
                  renderer = gifski_renderer(paste0(state, "animation.gif")))
    
  return(anim)
}

animateAccidents(rall_accidents, 53)
```


```{r}
animateAccidentsState <- function(accidents, state = 0){
  
  # FIPS code to state name lookup
  fips_to_state <- c(
    "1" = "alabama", "2" = "alaska", "4" = "arizona", "5" = "arkansas",
    "6" = "california", "8" = "colorado", "9" = "connecticut", "10" = "delaware",
    "11" = "district of columbia", "12" = "florida", "13" = "georgia",
    "15" = "hawaii", "16" = "idaho", "17" = "illinois", "18" = "indiana",
    "19" = "iowa", "20" = "kansas", "21" = "kentucky", "22" = "louisiana",
    "23" = "maine", "24" = "maryland", "25" = "massachusetts", "26" = "michigan",
    "27" = "minnesota", "28" = "mississippi", "29" = "missouri", "30" = "montana",
    "31" = "nebraska", "32" = "nevada", "33" = "new hampshire", "34" = "new jersey",
    "35" = "new mexico", "36" = "new york", "37" = "north carolina", "38" = "north dakota",
    "39" = "ohio", "40" = "oklahoma", "41" = "oregon", "42" = "pennsylvania",
    "44" = "rhode island", "45" = "south carolina", "46" = "south dakota",
    "47" = "tennessee", "48" = "texas", "49" = "utah", "50" = "vermont",
    "51" = "virginia", "53" = "washington", "54" = "west virginia",
    "55" = "wisconsin", "56" = "wyoming"
  )
  
  if(state != 0){
    accidents <- accidents %>%
      filter(STATE == state)
    state_name <- fips_to_state[as.character(state)]
    map_outline <- map_data("state", region = state_name)
  } else {
    map_outline <- map_data("state")  # full contiguous US
  }
  
  accidents <- accidents %>%
    mutate(
      expire_date = pmin(date %m+% years(4), as.Date("2025-01-01"))
    )

  plot <- ggplot(accidents, aes(x = LONGITUD, y = LATITUDE, color = STATE)) +
    geom_polygon(data = map_outline, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
                 fill = NA, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +  # state outline
    geom_point(size = 1, alpha = 0.6, shape = 16, show.legend = FALSE) +
    coord_map("albers", lat0 = 30, lat1 = 45) +
    transition_events(
      start = date,
      end = expire_date,
      enter_length = as.difftime(30, units = "days"),
      exit_length = as.difftime(1, units = "days")
    ) +
    enter_fade() +
    labs(title = "Date: {frame_time}") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
          axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
  
  anim <- animate(plot, 
          nframes = 144, 
          fps = 10,
          duration = 14,
          renderer = gifski_renderer(paste0(state, "animationBound.gif")))
    
  return(anim)
}

animateAccidentsState(rall_accidents,0)
```

# Actual Data Overview
```{r}
crashdata <- read.csv("../566 Project Data/crashes2023.csv")
```

```{r}
head(crashdata)

crashdata %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "value") %>%
  group_by(column) %>%
  summarise(
    num_unique  = n_distinct(value)
  )
```
